positive: A stylized, geometric rendition of a celestial river flowing through a stylized forest landscape. The scene features abstract constellations forming paths around lush, vibrant trees with glowing bioluminescent leaves. The composition should be highly symmetrical and balanced, utilizing strong contrast between deep indigo blues and radiant lime greens/gold accents. Flat vector illustration style mixed with ethereal cosmic watercolor textures. Cinematic, detailed, highly decorative, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central placement, silhouette-friendly, clean lines, high contrast, pop art influence, mystic art style.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, text, signature, watermark, lowres, bad anatomy, malformed, out of frame, extra limbs, messy, messy details, photorealism, realistic, messy lines, logos, trademarks
